# SemanticLakehouse.com

SemanticLakehouse.com is an educational platform dedicated to Data Lakehouses, the Semantic Layer, Agentic Analytics, and Query Federation, with a focus on Dremio's unified engine-catalog-semantic layer approach.

## Structure
- / : Home page defining core concepts.
- /blog : Directory of blogs aggregated from datalakehousehub.com.
- /reading : Recommended books on Data and AI authored by Alex Merced.
- /knowledge-base : A comprehensive dictionary of data engineering and analytics terms.
